_comment: SFX mix config for examples/chapter-hud.example.txt. Pairs with audiobooker-mix-sfx after audiobooker has rendered the segments. Place WAV files referenced below in your sfx_dir; the names here are placeholders for whatever ambient/oneshot files you actually have.

ambients._comment: Quiet corridor hum bed under most of the scene. Looped + faded.

oneshots._comment: Light flicker click on the opening line.
Subtle electronic chirp behind the first HUD readout.
Distant low rumble when Aurora first speaks.
